name: Arizer Air SE Vaporizer
summary: A glass-stem portable vaporiser with a swappable 18650 battery and five presets, for patients who want simple, reliable dosing on the go.
description: The Arizer Air SE keeps things straightforward: five temperature presets, a glass aroma tube for clean flavour, and a removable 18650 battery you can swap in seconds rather than waiting to recharge. Heat-up is fast and results are consistent session to session. It can be used while charging, so it never has to be out of action. The glass stem means a little more care when carrying, but it's a big part of why the vapour tastes so clean. A dependable, no-fuss option for patients who value flavour and a serviceable battery.

specs.label: Dimensions
specs.value: Height: 7 in / 17.78 cm w/ Stem Diameter: 1.18 in / 3 cm
